item.title: C’mon BBC. Zilis was sharp as a tack on the stand, on her role in the OpenAI *nonprofit* board, and ...
item.description:
C’mon BBC. Zilis was sharp as a tack on the stand, on her role in the OpenAI *nonprofit* board, and how she managed conflicts as they began to develop, and this (which is not really even news since it was reported a couple years ago) is the headline.
Annoying, sexist, and missing the main points of her testimony.
--- @GaryMarcus | ❤️ 23 | 🔁 0 | 💬 6 | 👁 1847
item.author: @GaryMarcus
